step.title: Identify topic and learner level
step.action: Identify the testing topic the user wants to learn about.
Assess the learner's current level to calibrate depth and vocabulary.

step.title: Explain the concept
step.action: Explain the concept using real-world analogies that make it intuitive.
Define key terms and distinguish from related concepts.

step.title: Walk through a worked example
step.action: Walk through a complete worked example with code.
Annotate each step so the learner understands the why behind the code.

step.title: Provide a practice exercise
step.action: Provide a practice exercise that reinforces the concept.
Include progressive hints so the learner can attempt it independently first.

step.title: Summarize key takeaways
step.action: Summarize key takeaways in a concise list.
Call out common mistakes and misconceptions.

steps.step: <template-output file="docs/testing-artifacts/testing-lesson-.md"> Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with lesson content.
